title: Radisson India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Radisson India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Radisson India in Meerut is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Radisson India:
Radisson India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Radisson India!
